sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6497" key="a)nazesmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνα-ζεσμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n6497.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">irritation,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῶν οὐλῶν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:43" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.43</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
